title: uragoga chlorantha
side_effects: Uragoga chlorantha can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness and nausea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to kidney damage and respiratory failure. Additionally, improper preparation and dosing of the plant may cause stomach ulcers and allergic reactions in some individuals. It is crucial to consult a medical professional before using Uragoga chlorantha for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
